# Orbit

> Orbit is a local-first desktop trading decision-support platform. It helps a
> human analyze markets, manage a portfolio, and journal trades. It is NOT an
> autonomous trading bot and never places or executes orders on its own — every
> broker action requires explicit human confirmation.

Orbit runs entirely on the user's machine (Tauri desktop shell + a local FastAPI
sidecar). There is no public website or hosted API for external agents to crawl
or transact with. Agents interact with Orbit in two ways:

1. **Coding agents** read this repo (see `AGENTS.md`) to plan and implement work.
2. **Runtime agents** (the in-app AI, or any local MCP/HTTP client) call the
   local FastAPI backend at `http://localhost:8000`.

## Safety policy (non-negotiable)

- Orbit is decision support, never an autonomous trading bot.
- No order is placed or executed without explicit human confirmation.
- All broker, AI-provider, and persistence access flows through the FastAPI backend.
- Cloud AI is opt-in only; secrets live in the OS keychain, never in SQLite or logs.
- Machine-readable version of this policy: `GET /.well-known/agent.json` on the running backend.

## Modules

- **Parallax**: technical analysis, screening, watchlists, and alerts.
- **MoonMarket**: portfolio, account, options, and order workflows (human-confirmed).
- **Inflect**: trading journal and trade review.

Cross-module identity uses `conid` (IBKR contract id); ticker text is display metadata only.

## Runtime interfaces (live backend)

- [OpenAPI spec](http://localhost:8000/openapi.json): full machine-readable API contract.
- [Interactive docs](http://localhost:8000/docs): Swagger UI for the same contract.
- [Agent manifest](http://localhost:8000/.well-known/agent.json): capabilities + safety policy as JSON.

## Canonical docs (this repo)

- [Agent instructions](AGENTS.md): rules, workflow, and human-approval gates for agents.
- [Backend architecture](docs/architecture/backend.md)
- [Frontend architecture](docs/architecture/frontend.md)
- [Module ownership & trading safety](docs/architecture/modules.md)
- [Testing policy](docs/testing.md)
- [IBKR pacing & cold start](docs/ibkr-pacing.md)
- [Roadmap & deferred work](PROJECT_PLAN.md)
- [Agent workflow setup](docs/agent-workflow.md)

## Stack

Tauri v2, React 19 / TypeScript, Tailwind / shadcn, FastAPI / Python 3.12,
Polars (pandas only for the pandas-ta bridge), SQLite, IBKR Client Portal, Ollama.
